commands.review_summary:
The PR removes Codex's harness-level direct source `message_tool` default, keeps external harness `deliveryDefaults` compatibility, and updates tests, docs, changelog, and prompt snapshot fixture text for the opt-in message-tool path.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main sets the Codex harness default to `message_tool`, the direct resolver maps that to `message_tool_only`, and the current dispatch test asserts the final reply is not queued.

target.title: fix(messages): keep Codex direct replies automatic
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove the Codex harness direct-chat `message_tool` default so unset Codex source chats use the same automatic final-reply path as other runtimes.
- Keep generic harness `deliveryDefaults` compatibility for external harness plugins, with the field marked deprecated.
- Update docs, changelog, and Codex prompt snapshot fixture text for the opt-in message-tool path.

Refs #83393

## Verification
Behavior addressed: Direct Codex-backed source chats with unset `messages.visibleReplies` now resolve to automatic final delivery and queue the final reply.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test extensions/codex/index.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/source-reply-delivery-mode.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`; `OPENCLAW_TEST_TRUST_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=1 OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=extensions pnpm prompt:snapshots:check`; `git diff --check`; `pnpm check:changed` on Testbox `tbx_01krxb21va1fvrg8dt0zkc760p`; `codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --sandbox danger-full-access review --uncommitted`.
Evidence after fix: `dispatch-from-config.test.ts` covers unset Codex direct delivery as automatic, and preserves non-Codex harness direct defaults as message-tool-only. Source-tree prompt snapshots are current. Testbox run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26028713410 completed with exit 0.
Observed result after fix: Focused tests passed, prompt snapshot check passed, diff whitespace check passed, changed gate passed, and autoreview reported no actionable correctness issues after accepted fixes.
What was not tested: No live Signal/Telegram/Codex gateway roundtrip; dispatch behavior is covered at source-level tests.
